{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Eltarim
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Eltarim]] is a location where Feiora holds the position of [[Overlord]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
